headline: Molson Coors Could Drop Another 3% as Barclays Slashes Target to $40 With Underweight Rating
summary: Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP) has been under sustained pressure heading into 2026. Shares are down nearly 2.00%% over the past week, and more than 13% year to date. Over the past year, TAP has fallen 30.05%, well off its 52-week high of $63.50. The stock closed most recently at $41.16. While the Street’s consensus target sits ... Molson Coors Could Drop Another 3% as Barclays Slashes Target to $40 With Underweight Rating

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $47 to $40.
